{{Infobox group
| name = Silent Servants
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

''See also: [[Silent Servants Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Silent Servants are a cult dedicated to the [[Dreadgod]] known as the [[Silent King]]. Members of this group are characterized by their use of white cloths to cover the lower halves of their faces and are often identified by glowing white halos or rings around their heads. These halos serve as a [[Goldsign]], with some members possessing miniature replicas of the [[Silent King]]'s own halo. The cult operates from a floating [[island]] featuring a prominent, tall white tree that emits a halo of crystallized light madra. As an organization, the Silent Servants are known for their expertise in stealth and psychological manipulation; they have been described as skilled spies and liars capable of brainwashing others. Their influence is tied to the [[Silent King]]'s ability to coordinate many individuals through mental connection, a process that can be taxing on the subjects' willpower and physical health. The group includes high-ranking figures such as [[Heralds]], like [[Balari]], and the [[Silent Sage]]. While they act as guardians for certain sects, their presence is often viewed with suspicion due to their association with the [[Silent King]]'s mental assaults and their reputation for subverting enemy factions.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Silent Servants]] have bound mouths.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Silent Servants]] are a cult of the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Silent Servants are one of the various groups positioned around the valley. This organization possesses a floating [[island]] that is dominated by a massive, pure-white tree. During the competition, no member of the Silent Servants managed to reach the top eight, though [[Juvari]] is a known member of the group. During the events, an archer from their ranks successfully discharged an arrow made of light.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Juvari]] is of the [[Silent Servants]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|No Silent Servant made the top eight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Silent Servants]] possess a floating [[island]] covered by a giant pure-white tree.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An archer among the [[Silent Servants]] fired an arrow of light.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Silent Servants]] are one of the groups surrounding the valley.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[island]] of the [[Silent Servants]] features a shining white tree.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Silent Servants]] is a cult of the tiger [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent Servants]] settled to the west amidst the ruins of [[Mount Venture]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Silent Servants]] are well-known spies and liars.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Silent Servants]] have [[madra]] that can glow with intention.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Kenvata Nasuma Juvari of the Silent Servants, chosen of Reigan Shen, you face Sophara of the gold dragons, chosen of the Dragon King!”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
